notes: Q3VL-8B-Q8 reps are uniformly stronger: they get button states right (Check for Updates enabled, Reset red) but consistently omit the ⌘N/⌘P/⌘K shortcuts and the truncated x.AI entry. Q3.5-4B reps are more structurally complete (most include xAI and two reps correctly note the keyboard shortcuts) but systematically misreport the enabled buttons (Change Location / Show in Finder / Open Logs / Uninstall / Check for Updates) as disabled/grayed-out — a consistent state-reading weakness rather than hallucination. No response fabricated content; all errors are either omissions or visible-element misreads (key_misses per judge rules).
